title: Database Layer
description: The database layer of a feature: a schema module (any ORM or SQL toolkit) + migrations + an ERD ground-truth. The ERD is authority; the schema must stay in parity with it.

schema_module.description: Database schema module (any ORM or SQL toolkit), e.g. 'db/src/schema/sales.ts'.

entities.description: Tables/entities the feature owns or extends.

fk.description: Referenced table, if a foreign key.

immutable.description: True if rows are write-once (enforced by trigger).

erd_ref.description: Path to the authoritative ERD for this context (a DFD/ERD JSON or diagram). May be 'MISSING' to flag a known gap.
